mechanism_narrative: When FEDFUNDS is near the zero lower bound and CPIAUCSL is not accelerating, the market reads policy as highly accommodative. That combination supports multiple expansion and lowers equity discount rates, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if triggered windows produce negative or below-baseline 20d SPX returns more than 55% of the time, or if the interaction term between FEDFUNDS and CPIAUCSL is not positive in rolling 2-year tests.

mechanism_narrative: A rising UNRATE indicates weakening household income and lower aggregate demand, while weak PAYEMS confirms labor-market deterioration. This combination compresses earnings expectations and should lead to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: UNRATE rises by at least 0.3 percentage points over 3 months
failure_condition: Rejected if 20d SPX forward returns are positive in more than 60% of UNRATE-rise trigger events, or if PAYEMS deterioration does not strengthen the negative signal relative to UNRATE alone.

mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in RSAFS signals softening consumer and business demand, which directly reduces expected sales growth for index constituents. Lower top-line expectations should translate into negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if six-month-to-three-month RSAFS growth is negative but subsequent 60d SPX returns are not below baseline, or if the sign of the relationship reverses for more than one rolling 3-year window.

mechanism_narrative: A rising INDPRO with stable or falling CPIAUCSL indicates improving real output growth without an inflation shock. That combination supports earnings expectations and risk appetite, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change > 0 and CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change <= 3%
failure_condition: Rejected if the trigger does not outperform unconditional returns, or if positive INDPRO shocks accompanied by accelerating CPIAUCSL fail to show a materially different response.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts are a leading real-activity indicator. When HOUST is falling, markets infer weaker construction activity, softer credit demand, and lower future consumption, which should push S&P 500 returns negative over the next 5 trading days.
candidate_trigger: HOUST declines for 2 consecutive monthly releases
failure_condition: Rejected if consecutive HOUST declines are followed by positive 5d SPX returns more than 60% of the time, or if the signal loses significance in any rolling 18-month window.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in FEDFUNDS during a period of weak CPIAUCSL inflation signals an overt tightening impulse that raises discount rates faster than nominal growth can compensate. This should produce negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: FEDFUNDS rises by at least 0.50 percentage points over 3 months while CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change stays below 2.5%
failure_condition: Rejected if tightening-plus-low-inflation episodes fail to generate materially negative 60d SPX returns, or if the sign flips positive in more than one-third of triggered observations.

mechanism_narrative: A falling PAYEMS series directly signals job losses and weaker household cash flow. Equity investors should discount future profits downward, so sustained payroll contraction predicts negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rejected if negative 1- to 3-month PAYEMS growth does not correspond to below-baseline 20d SPX returns, or if the effect is absent in most rolling 2-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: When INDPRO is rising while UNRATE is not falling, production growth is likely inventory rebuilding or productivity-led rather than demand-led. That mix weakens the equity upside from industrial improvement and should produce neutral to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO 3-month change > 0 and UNRATE does not decline over the same 3 months
failure_condition: Rejected if the trigger is followed by positive 20d SPX returns in a majority of cases, or if the interaction does not outperform INDPRO-alone signals in out-of-sample tests.
